description: Extract data for updated statue bonus calculations including Zenith statue support

extractions.label: artifact_30_bonus
extractions.description: Sailing artifact 30 (Onyx Lantern) bonus - added to the base onyxStatueBonus of 2

extractions.label: zenith_market_0_bonus
extractions.description: ZenithMarket bonus 0 (True Zen) - added to the base 50 in zenithStatueBonus calculation

extractions.label: event_shop_19_owned
extractions.description: Event shop bonus 19 (0 or 30) - game returns 0/1, multiplied by 0.3*100 to match domain's hardcoded 30

extractions.label: meritocracy_26_bonus
extractions.description: Meritocracy bonus 26 (statue bonus) - part of otherBonuses multiplier

extractions.label: upgrade_vault_25_bonus
extractions.description: UpgradeVault upgrade 25 computed bonus (%) - applied to statues at indices [0, 1, 2, 6] only

extractions.label: voodoo_statufication_bonus
extractions.description: Voodoo Statufication talent bonus (skillIndex 56, -1 = best across all players)

extractions.label: statue_0_bonus
extractions.description: Statue index 0 bonus (upgrade vault bonus applies, index is in [0,1,2,6])

extractions.label: statue_1_bonus
extractions.description: Statue index 1 bonus (upgrade vault bonus applies, index is in [0,1,2,6])

extractions.label: statue_5_bonus
extractions.description: Statue index 5 bonus (upgrade vault bonus does NOT apply - not in [0,1,2,6])

extractions.label: statue_24_bonus
extractions.description: Statue index 24 bonus (upgrade vault bonus does NOT apply)

extractions.label: statue_29_bonus
extractions.description: Dragon statue (index 29) bonus - used as dragonStatueBonus input; dragon does NOT apply dragonStatueBonus to itself
